tomato.watering_policy: Water when the top 2 cm of soil feels dry.
tomato.fertilizer_advice: Use balanced NPK fertilizer once every 2 weeks.
tomato.soil_advice: Well-draining loamy soil with compost is recommended.
tomato.sunlight_advice: Provide 6 to 8 hours of sunlight daily.

potato.watering_policy: Keep soil evenly moist, but avoid waterlogging.
potato.fertilizer_advice: Apply phosphorus-rich fertilizer during tuber formation.
potato.soil_advice: Loose, well-draining loamy soil with good organic matter is best.
potato.sunlight_advice: Provide 4 to 6 hours of sunlight daily.

corn.watering_policy: Water regularly in hot weather and allow soil to drain.
corn.fertilizer_advice: Use nitrogen-rich fertilizer at early growth stages.
corn.soil_advice: Rich, well-draining soil with steady moisture retention is recommended.
corn.sunlight_advice: Provide full sun with at least 6 hours daily.
